phase_progress: Phase 9 production cutover COMPLETE (C-001..C-009 merged + deployed; root-signin auth fix PR #78; budget migrated PR #84). New sub-phase C-005d planned: migrate the last two file-writing settings handlers (memory + channels) to the SurrealDB config store, reusing the C-005c config_overrides infra. Assessment verdict: proceed; secret VALUES stay out of the DB (secrets.env / env vars only). Three ordered changes planned: C-005d.1 trusted-section resolve path (TRUSTED_SECTION_KEYS, folds budget off the config_set allowlist), C-005d.2 memory handler (memory + proactive_memory overrides), C-005d.3 channels handler (sidecar_channels override; secrets.env untouched; include-shadow guard preserved).

next_action.description: Implement the trusted-section apply path in resolve_config_with_overrides (add TRUSTED_SECTION_KEYS, OR-gate, remove the budget config_set allowlist entry), with config_store_overlay_test coverage. Then C-005d.2 (memory) and C-005d.3 (channels). No secret VALUE may enter the store at any step.
